source_text: 今天我想练习一段关于校园学习生活的英文表达。
quick_translation: Today I want to practice an English paragraph about campus learning and daily life.
deep_translation: Today, I would like to practice writing an English paragraph about learning and daily life on campus.
learning_notes: would like to is more suitable for semi-formal writing than want to.
on campus is more natural than in campus.
